tape: Broad tape firm and calm mid-afternoon -- S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17%, Russell +0.39%, VIX ~16.3 (-1.2%) on soft June PPI (-0.3% headline, core +0.2%) after Tuesday's cool CPI plus the ASML AI-capex read; Morgan Stanley beat ($3.46 vs $2.94) leads benign bank earnings; quant_regime calm_drift concurs, no sector shock.

alerts.headline: Firm/calm tape: S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17%, VIX 16.31 (-1.15%) on soft June PPI + cool CPI + ASML AI-capex. Bank earnings benign (MS beat +1%). No index/sector shock; quant_regime calm_drift agrees with my read.

HELD ~$2.31 -- FRESH 7/15: completed first operational prototype of Wraptor MX multi-shot non-lethal platform + selected law-enforcement partners for an exclusive early-adopter program (builds WrapShield: handheld + multi-shot + DFR-X drone). Product/dev milestone, NOT a contract or revenue award, so no boost; also risk.json grades WRAP elevated on the 38.9% price-cache desync (phantom-sell gated by fix a5484b6). FinBERT +0.019.

HELD/best gainer ~$14.62 (score 9.4) -- no fresh 7/15 catalyst; +13% ICONIQ/director $14.4M buys already priced, Q1 FY27 $201.6M rev (+28% YoY) guides ~23% growth. Post-lockup Lightspeed/Form 144 distribution overhang persists (risk.json elevated). FinBERT +0.158. No boost.

HELD ~$13.05-$13.58, down ~25% on the month on sector weakness -- no fresh company item; Bhappu $968k (7/7) + Hansen $51k (7/8) buys scored but risk.json insider signal net-NEGATIVE by size (Chalmers Form 144 200k 6/29 + 300k 7/9). $300M ATM confirmed UNDRAWN. Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. No boost.

HELD, clean ~$17.19 (score 9.2) -- no fresh 7/15 item; Caris Detect multi-cancer launch (7/1), director $990k buy (7/13), $100M buyback, NO shelf/ATM. Evercore Buy $25 / avg PT $28 above price. FinBERT +0.144. No boost.

HELD, low risk ~$5.58 -- no fresh item; Q1 FY27 (7/7) $107.9M rev / $0.15 non-GAAP / $26.9M adj EBITDA; director Englander bought 76,190 sh @ $5.22 (7/13, now 141,190 held). Anti-dilutive $140M self-tender, no shelf/ATM. Next print 9/9. FinBERT 0.0. No boost.

TOP CANDIDATE (4.75, below 5.25 line) -- EDGAR re-check confirms NO new July offering; ~30% standing dilution stands: $50M registered direct (27.6M sh @ $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26, 7/6 F-3 registers 3.03M PIPE sh for resale. Stock ~$1.70 BELOW the $1.81 offer, CEO buys came AFTER the raise. Concur risk.json -- do not buy as insider breakout.
TOP CANDIDATE (4.6, below line) -- textbook pump-and-dump: HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.49, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto. Concur risk.json.

TOP CANDIDATE (3.7, below line) -- 12-for-1 reverse split effective 7/14 (new CUSIP G8071C137) purely for Nasdaq $1 compliance on an unfunded AI/blockchain/crypto pivot; +0.919 FinBERT is a misattributed generic-market headline. Reverse-split cache desync noted. Concur risk.json -- keep vetoed.

WATCHLIST ~$6.45 -- no fresh item this hour; DLA bridge modification extended the refrigerant contract to 11/29/26 (options to 5/29/27) + Hartree Partners 10%-owner open-market buying (5,234 sh @ $5.99 7/6-7/7, 4,976,536 total) already known/scored. No dilution flag. No boost.
